titleStmt.title: SII 4.1326: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1326. (A.R. No. 404 of 1893). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
pṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara paramabhaṭṭaraka ravi kula
tilaka cōḍakulaśēkhara pāṇḍyakulāṁtaka samastarājāśraya rājarā
jēṁdra vīramaheṁdra vikramacōḍa vijayābharaṇa rājakēsariva¨rmmape¨rmma
naḍigalu gaṁggākāvērīpa¨ryyaṁtaṁ saptamōviṣṇuva¨rddhanulaina tribhu
vanacakrava¨rtti śrīkulōttuṁggacōḍadēvara prava¨rddhamānavijayarā
jyasaṁvatsa 48 dina 316 ṇṭa gaṁggagoṇḍacōḍavalanāṁṭi guddavādinā
ṁṭi peddaḍakarēmi śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvaraku niddēvara dēvadānamai
na peddaḍakarēmi peddamunnūṁṭi sāni bijjavasaṁkkari vyatiyipātani
mittamuna śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvarakuṁ beṭṭina yakhaṇḍava¨rtti divi
ya yokkaṇḍu . dīniki nācaṁdra¨rkkamu neyu sariyiṁccuvārugā śrībhī
mēśvaramahādēvara kilaramuna prōlabōla nāvayayuṁ bōtabōla
nayuṁ bādibōla nāvayayuṁ dalarāśi nāvayayu berasi bōlu
nalvuruṁ buṁṭagā bōtabōla rājana yaḍapuna ponnaraji vasamuna viḍcina
[Inupa]Eḍlu 50 . nityapaḍi golavaṁgala tribhuvanāṁkkuśa nē māna 1 . likhītaṁ
Digital edition of SII 4.1326 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
